headline: Warren Buffett Beat Ndamukong Suh In An Arm Wrestle Match: What Else Buffett Taught The NFL Player
summary:
Since his days of football at the University of Nebraska, Ndamukong Suh has been one of the top defensive tackles in the sport. When he’s not terrorizing quarterbacks on the NFL field today, Suh is engaged in investing and helping out the community.

Along the way, Suh gained valuable insight from one of the most legendary investors of all time.

headline: Apple's Mixed Reality Headset Debut Pushed Out To June, Gurman Says: Why It Works Out For The Best
summary: Apple, Inc.’s (NASDAQ: AAPL) mixed-reality headset is touted as the tech giant’s next biggest product, and it has long been in the works.

headline: Putin The Reality Star: You've Heard Of Keeping Up With The Kardashians, Get Ready For Keeping Up With The Kremlin
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin is set to be the star of a new reality show, but there’s a huge catch. Here are the details on a new show called “Keeping Up With The Kremlin.”

headline: Consumer Reports' Auto Brand Survey Ranks This German Automaker #1: Here's How Tesla And Others Fared
summary: Consumer Reports, a non-profit organization that does independent testing and research as well as advocacy, recently released its rankings of 32 auto brands based on the overall scores of their models.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Just Announced $META Is Rolling Out A Paid Verification  Tier Called Meta Verified Starting At $11.99 Per Month
